scenes.text:
Most people think routines are
restrictive. The opposite is true.

Decision fatigue is real. Every choice you make drains your mental energy. Steve Jobs wore the same outfit every day. Obama only wore
blue or gray suits. Not because they lacked options, but because they understood that discipline in small things creates freedom for big things.

Build a morning routine that runs on autopilot. When your basics are automated, your
brain is free to focus on what actually matters. Creating, building, and growing.

Routine is not a cage. It is
the foundation that gives you wings.

Drop your morning routine in the
comments. Follow for productive living.
